column1: # Mechanical subset of the trope library (see library.md — the human record stays there).
# PERM  = calcified into house style; never decays. Any hit means the draft changes. LOGGED_AT is "-".
# BAN   = any hit means the draft changes — until it cools. LOGGED_AT is the catalog song-count
#         at the device's last use; when (current catalog − LOGGED_AT) ≥ the cooling threshold
#         (60 songs, tunable via TROPE_COOL_THRESHOLD), check.sh demotes the line to WATCH.
# WATCH = a hit is allowed only with a stated, song-specific justification — never as a reflex.
# LOGGED_AT backfill (2026-07-24) is approximate by era: 73 = pre-seed sources, 95 = post-seed
# earlier sessions, 108 = this week's songs. New lines record the exact count (write-song step 7).
# Patterns are anchors, not full lines. A miss here proves nothing about constructions-with-slots
# or imagery motifs — those stay in the fuzzy check (library.md Constructions + Imagery).
